name: fate-spectrum/portrait
description: 命主格局画像。抓最能定义命主运行方式的结构，输出 tags 与 summary。

input.context: Fate context with userInfo, sanitized chart, scoringContext, current dayun/year, palaces, and output shape.

tags: String array of the strongest explainable structure labels.
portrait.summary: Readable product-style portrait of the native operating pattern.
